source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Handling Sub

event.top_event: Tubing hanger handling tool separation and falling load strike
event.incident_type: Structural damage and personnel injury from dropped load
actions_taken: Both injured employees evacuated via medevac to hospital
THHT sent for further evaluation and testing
event.summary: On 7 July 2014 at 1940 hours during workover operations on the Seadrill West Vela platform in MC Block 776, a tubing hanger handling tool (THHT) separated from a tubing hanger at approximately 35 degrees angle while being transported. The hanger fell approximately 15 feet to the pipe skate, striking one employee and causing another to fall while avoiding the falling load. Two Seadrill employees were injured: one with lacerations to elbow and bruising; the second with two fractured ribs and lacerated spleen. The probable cause was either mechanical failure of the THHT or improper installation, though this remained undetermined at time of investigation.

hazards.name: Suspended load during lifting and handling operations
Mechanical equipment failure in lifting tools

threats.name: THHT mechanical failure during load handling
Improper installation of THHT on tubing hanger
Loss of load control during transport at angle

consequences.name: Personnel struck by falling tubing hanger

controls.name: FMC Technologies THHT installation procedure
controls.barrier_role: Ensure proper installation of tubing hanger handling tool

supporting_text: The FMC Technologies' procedures document shows that the onsite FMC Technologies Representative initialed each procedural step for the installation of the THHT in the tubing hanger
At the time of the investigation it is unknown whether the THHT failed due to a mechanical failure or whether the THHT was not installed properly

controls.name: FMC Technologies representative verification of THHT installation
controls.barrier_role: Verify correct installation and readiness of THHT before lifting

supporting_text: The on-site FMC Technologies representative told the BP representative that the THHT was installed and ready to lay out
The on-site FMC representative that verified the installation of the THHT has 14 years of experience running these tools

controls.name: Air tugger load control during assembly transport
controls.barrier_role: Maintain control of suspended load during movement to storage

supporting_text: Using an air tugger, the drill crew landed the hanger on the pipe skate and began to tail the assembly out from the drill floor
When the assembly reached approximately a 35° angle the THHT separated from the tubing hanger

controls.name: Personnel positioning and awareness during load handling
controls.barrier_role: Prevent personnel from being in strike zone of suspended load

supporting_text: The tugger operator (IE2) was struck by the tubing hanger and another employee (IE1) on the opposite side of the skate fell to the deck to avoid the tubing hanger
At the time of the investigation it was unclear whether IE1 was struck by the tubing hanger or was injured as he fell

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
